allow: Bash(node -e "const { Pool } = require\('pg'\); const p = new Pool\({host:'localhost',port:5432,database:'university_platform',user:'postgres',password:'bauka07'}\); p.query\('SELECT 1'\).then\(\(\)=>{ console.log\('OK'\); p.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.log\('ERROR:', e.message\); p.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const { Pool } = require\('pg'\); const p = new Pool\({host:'localhost',port:5432,database:'postgres',user:'postgres',password:'bauka07'}\); p.query\('SELECT datname FROM pg_database'\).then\(r=>{ console.log\('Databases:', r.rows.map\(x=>x.datname\).join\(', '\)\); p.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.log\('ERROR:', e.message\); p.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const { Pool } = require\('pg'\); const p = new Pool\({host:'localhost',port:5432,database:'postgres',user:'postgres',password:'bauka07'}\); p.query\('CREATE DATABASE university_platform'\).then\(\(\)=>{ console.log\('OK: database created'\); p.end\(\); }\).catch\(e=>{ console.log\('ERROR:', e.message\); p.end\(\); }\);")
